title: stelis dapsilis
intro: Stelis dapsilis, also known as the Dapsil's Stelis, is a type of orchid native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Stelis dapsilis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be used to make various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
